title: Heading to Australia in March!
excerpt: Thanks so much for your patience while the schedule was being finely tuned. So excited to finally announce the itinerary for my tour in Australia with Spotlight stores for National Craft month. The last time I was down under was…
body:
Thanks so much for your patience while the schedule was being finely tuned. So excited to finally announce the itinerary for my tour in Australia with Spotlight stores for National Craft month.

The last time I was down under was in 2013 when I was halfway through my pregnancy with Jack, look at that belly!

If you or your friends are in these cities and think you'll be able to hang out with me, please let me know in the comments!
